nodes.label: Callback from the existing import pipeline into persistent acquisition.
Resolve native-import or correlated legacy-grab business ids.
Journal entry into the shared pipeline once per correlated grab.      Acquisitio
Append one structured quality/Acoustic-ID verdict.      Multiple attempts intent
Journal a shared-pipeline success when it belongs to an acquisition.      Ordina
Journal quarantine only for files dispatched by Acquisition.
Consume an exact Force-Grab approval at a shared pipeline guard.      The serial
Fail and blocklist an Acquisition release after legacy retries end.
Terminally close the retry journal for one acquisition track.
Complete a correlated manual grab after shared-pipeline success.      Manual leg
Journal quarantine of a correlated manual grab as history only.      The request
Close a cancelled legacy manual/scheduled grab, without affecting it.      The D
End the retry walk when a user approves the quarantined file.      The approval
End the retry walk when the user cancels the task.      Cancel must never trigge
